title: lonicera henryi var. transarisanensis
intro: Lonicera henryi var. transarisanensis, also known as Henry's honeysuckle, is a deciduous shrub native to mountainous regions in China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, derived from its flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Lonicera henryi var. transarisanensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate sore throats, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are traditionally used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of the common cold.
